name: Small Office Cabin
description:
A small office cabin from SAMAN is 10 × 10 × 9 ft — the smallest workspace in our portable office range, built for a 2–3 person team that needs a real office, not a site cabin and not a general-purpose compact cabin. Starting at ₹1,85,000, it ships factory-fitted in steel and wood with an AC point, a lockable door, a window, and basic electrical — ready to receive a team on the day of arrival. Built at our Bangalore and Greater Noida units. Pan-India delivery in 7–21 working days.

A 10×10×9 ft Workspace for 2–3 People

Empty interior view — about 92 sqft of useful floor space after wall thickness, 9 ft of ceiling height for AC and fan clearance.

The floor area is 100 square feet — about 92 sqft of useful interior after wall thickness. Ceiling height is 9 ft, which matters more than it sounds: it gives room for a split-AC mounted high on the wall, a ceiling fan, and ceiling-mounted LED lights without any of them hanging into your line of sight when standing.

Capacity ceiling: two desks side by side with a single visitor chair between them, or three hot-desk workstations along three walls with no visitor seating. A fourth person can stand and review work for short periods, but a compact office cabin like this one is not designed for a fourth daily occupant. If your team will be larger, the next size up handles 4–6 people without crowding.

Who Buys a Small Office Cabin

A small office cabin sells to buyers whose office need is genuinely single-room. Five typical profiles:

Startup founders adding their first 1–2 hires. Budget under ₹2 lakh, no investor capital for a full lease, but the business needs a real address and a quiet place to take client calls.

Single supervisors on a factory or warehouse floor. A dedicated admin office adjacent to production — not the same as a contractor's construction-site cabin, which is a different product entirely.

Single-room school administration. An extra admin cabin next to an existing school — for an accountant, a librarian, or a principal's office during a renovation.

Doctors' consultation chambers or single-room clinics. One cabin equals one private consult room. Adequate for a GP chamber, a dentist consult, or a small ENT clinic.

Freelancers with a partner or remote assistant. Home plot plus cabin equals a real office address, separate from the house.

One of five buyer profiles — a doctor's single-room consultation chamber set up beside an existing residential-commercial building.

A small office cabin fits if: ✓ team is 1–3 people · ✓ budget is under ₹2 lakh · ✓ a single room is enough · ✓ an AC point is sufficient (you supply the AC unit) · ✓ your site has level ground and a 10 ft minimum gate access.

Three Office Layouts Inside 10×10 ft

A 10×10 ft floor area handles three sensible workspace layouts. Each works for a different buyer.

Layout A — Single executive desk plus 2 visitor chairs. A 4×2 ft executive desk along the back wall, an office chair behind it, two visitor chairs in front. Best for a founder, a GP, a manager, or a consultant who meets clients one at a time. Leaves about 4 ft of clear walking space.

Layout B — L-shaped two-person desk plus 1 visitor chair. A 5×5 ft L-shape in one corner seats two people working in parallel. One visitor chair fits opposite. Best for a 2-person team — startup founder plus first hire, or a partner with an assistant.

Layout C — Round meeting table for 4. Replace desks with a 3 ft diameter round table and 4 chairs. Best for a client-facing cabin where short discussions matter more than dedicated work time — a small sales office, or a doctor's room used mostly for consultations.

Three workable office layouts inside 10×10 ft — single executive desk, L-shape for two, and a 4-person meeting table.

Layout Furniture inside Best for
A 1 executive desk · 1 office chair · 2 visitor chairs Founder / GP / manager who meets clients alone
B L-shape desk for 2 · 2 office chairs · 1 visitor chair 2-person team working in parallel
C 1 round meeting table · 4 chairs Client-facing cabin (short consults and meetings)

What's in the Box at ₹1,85,000

At the base price, every small office cabin ships with:

  • Frame: Welded mild steel structural frame, factory-fabricated
  • Cladding: Steel exterior with wood interior panel finish
  • Roof: Powder-coated MS sheet with weather seal
  • Door: 6 × 3 ft lockable steel entry door, two keys
  • Window: One sliding window with mosquito mesh
  • AC provision: 1.5-ton split AC mounting bracket and pre-wired conduit — AC unit not included
  • Electrical: MCB panel · 2 LED ceiling lights · 4 power sockets · 1 light switchboard
  • Flooring: Vinyl over plywood base — chair-roller-friendly
  • Exterior finish: Powder-coated in standard colour

Not included at ₹1,85,000: the AC unit itself, an additional window, an internal partition wall, an attached toilet, custom interior wood paneling, premium exterior cladding, or a custom exterior colour. Each is a priced add-on at order confirmation.

Delivery: One Trailer, No Crane Needed

A small office cabin dispatches as a single completed unit on one trailer — no panels, no on-site assembly. Pan-India transit takes 7–21 working days depending on distance from our Bangalore (Karnataka) or Greater Noida (Uttar Pradesh) facility, whichever is closer to your site.

Single-trailer delivery — the hydraulic flatbed lowers the cabin onto a PCC slab without a crane.

Site requirements before delivery:

  • Foundation: Level ground — either a 4-inch PCC slab or a well-compacted gravel pad
  • Access: Gate or driveway 10 ft wide minimum
  • Electrical: Your local electrician connects the MCB panel to mains on the day of arrival

No crane is required at this size — trailer hydraulics or a forklift handles placement.

When You'll Outgrow a Small Office Cabin

Three signs the small variant won't be enough:

  • Your team will pass 4 people within 12 months
  • You need a separate meeting room or a dedicated visitor area
  • You need a toilet attached to the office unit

If any of these apply, size up. The standard 12×16 ft portable office cabin handles 4–6 people at ₹3,75,000. For a team likely to grow further or one that will need multiple rooms over time, our modular multi-room office option starts at ₹4,35,000 and accepts add-on modules as your headcount grows.

Sizing up — the 10×10 ft small office cabin (left) next to the standard 12×16 ft portable office cabin (right), at the same site.

If your need isn't really an office — you're a contractor running a project site — a small site cabin for construction use is a different product. If you need a compact cabin for retail, storage, or residential use, see our general-purpose portable cabin range.

Small Office Cabin — Full Specifications

Specification Value
Floor size 10 × 10 ft (100 sqft)
Ceiling height 9 ft
Capacity 2–3 people
Frame Welded mild steel
Walls Steel exterior · wood interior
Roof Powder-coated MS sheet
Floor Vinyl over plywood base
Door 6 × 3 ft lockable steel, 1 unit
Window Sliding with mosquito mesh, 1 unit
AC provision 1.5-ton split AC point (unit not included)
Electrical MCB · 2 LED lights · 4 sockets
Delivery 7–21 working days Pan India
Starting price ₹1,85,000
SKU SP-CC-40-2024

Frequently Asked Questions

Can three people work comfortably inside a 10×10 office cabin?

Two people work comfortably with one visitor chair between them. Three people work in a hot-desk layout along three walls — but with no room for a fourth occupant or a visitor seat. If your team will be 4 or more for any sustained period, size up to the 12×16 ft variant.

Does ₹1,85,000 include the 1.5-ton split AC unit?

No. The base price covers the AC mounting bracket and pre-wired conduit only. A 1.5-ton split AC unit suitable for a 100 sqft cabin costs ₹40,000 to ₹55,000 separately — buy it locally and your site electrician fits it on the day of cabin delivery.

What happens if my team grows beyond 3 people within a year?

A small office cabin is a fixed-size single unit — it does not expand by adding rooms. If growth is likely within 12 months, start with our modular portable office cabin instead; you can bolt on additional modules at ₹1.5 to ₹2 lakh each as headcount grows.

Can a small toilet be attached to the small office cabin?

Not at this footprint. A toilet section needs a 10×14 ft minimum combined unit. For office plus toilet in one cabin, the portable cabin with attached toilet starts at ₹2,50,000 for the 10×14 ft MS configuration.

Is steel-and-wood construction durable for daily office use?

Yes. The welded mild steel structural frame has a 15 to 20 year service life with standard maintenance. Wood cladding is exterior-grade with a sealant finish — handles a 9-hour office cycle indefinitely with no special care. Vinyl flooring accepts chair rollers without scuffing.

What size desks actually fit inside 10×10 ft?

A 4 × 2 ft executive desk leaves about 4 ft of clear walking space. An L-shaped 5 × 5 ft desk for two people fits one visitor chair opposite. A 3 ft diameter round meeting table with 4 chairs works for meeting-focused layouts. Larger 6-ft conference desks are too big for this floor plan.

Get a Quote for Your Small Office Cabin

A small office cabin order is confirmed within 24 working hours. Share your site location, preferred delivery date, and any add-ons (AC unit, second window, custom colour). We dispatch from Bangalore or Greater Noida — whichever is closer to your site. Pan-India delivery in 7–21 working days.

Call or WhatsApp: +91 97089 89937

To compare across all sizes, see the full portable office cabin range or view current stock and pricing on our purchase page.

For a small site cabin for construction site use, see our porta cabin range. For a non-office compact cabin (retail, storage, residential), see our portable cabin range.
